series_metadata.series_description: Civil service applications and interview questions from applicants not hired Vacancy postings and applications, resumes, letters of recommendation, list of all applicants, addresses, letters of thanks and unqualified applicants for each posting civil service applications and interview questions from applicants not hired for each position.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: All applications are electronic. Only selected candidate''s applications are printed. Printed applications are retained and ; Electronic: 7 years position filled or decision not fill position is made
